contractVersion.description: Version of the supported downstream distribution contract. Version 1 covers Desktop, Cloud, and Gateway configuration surfaces.

webSearch.description: Enable OpenCode's native Exa-backed websearch integration by setting OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA for the managed runtime.

gatewayCloudConfig.description: Deprecated metadata-only gateway cloud binding. The gateway runtime ignores these fields; use OPEN_COWORK_CLOUD_BASE_URL, OPEN_COWORK_GATEWAY_SERVICE_TOKEN, and OPEN_COWORK_GATEWAY_ALLOW_INSECURE_HTTP from deployment secrets.

cloudRequestMs.description: Deprecated metadata-only field. The gateway runtime ignores file-backed values; use OPEN_COWORK_GATEWAY_CLOUD_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS from deployment secrets/env.

defaultAccess.description: Allow this read-only tool for every app-managed agent by default.
